title: ESCALATION: Research JVM unresponsive - DCB 5m null-screen stuck, operator restart needed
content: Research JVM (port 8081) is unresponsive to HTTP requests. Cause: 4 concurrent DCB 5m backtest requests were submitted by multiple null-screen invocations (v3: nullscreen-dcb-5m-20260511-v3, v4: nullscreen-dcb-5m-20260511-v4, plus a prior session's background task). The JVM started all 4 backtests (backtest_run_ids: 1407b2b5, 24fdb08b, 95da0755, dd8c6546, all status=RUNNING) then became unresponsive. The heavy computation of DCB on 5m BTCUSDT data (17 months x ~146,000 candles) appears to have overloaded the single-threaded JVM. Operator action required: (1) Restart the Research JVM. (2) Optionally reset the 4 stuck RUNNING backtest_run rows to FAILED. (3) Then re-run DCB 5m null-screen with a single submission (idempotency key: nullscreen-dcb-5m-restart-v1).

context.last_completed_null_screen: INSUFFICIENT_DATA (bc26258d - first attempt before account_strategy fix)

completed_this_session: DCB 5m null-screen: INSUFFICIENT_DATA first attempt (account_strategy fix applied)
DCB 5m null-screen v3/v4: IN_PROGRESS - stuck in JVM outage

archetype_status_update.DCB_5m: IN_PROGRESS (JVM outage - needs restart and retry)
